name: Tabs
goal: Render a tab strip + paired panels with shared chip-pill head treatment, full keyboard support, and two ergonomic input shapes.
description: Tabbed content widget for interactive production UX. The head reuses the same chip-pill visual style as ce-filter-bar (one family across the catalog). Two ways to provide tab labels: a JSON tabs[] prop (string or {label, badge?, disabled?}) for the data path, or slotted <button slot="tab"> children for richer markup. Panels always come from <* slot="panel"> children, paired with tabs by index. Roving tabindex; arrow keys / Home / End move selection; Space / Enter activate. Aria-selected, aria-controls, aria-labelledby connect tabs to panels. For static anchored sections in a vis-style document, prefer <ce-section> + <ce-toc>.

props.name: tabs
props.description: Tab labels. Strings or { label, badge?, disabled? } objects. Empty switches to slot-based mode where slot=tab children are used directly.

props.name: active
props.description: Index of the currently visible panel.

props.name: vertical
props.description: Render the tab strip on the leading edge instead of above the panels. Switches arrow-key axis to up/down.

events.name: ce-tab-change
events.description: Fires when the user picks a different tab.

slots.name: tab
slots.description: Tab buttons (slot-based mode). Each child becomes a tab. Component sets role=tab, aria-selected, tabindex, id, and click/keydown handlers automatically.

slots.name: panel
slots.description: Panel content. Each child becomes a panel paired by index with a tab. Component sets role=tabpanel, aria-labelledby, hidden.

a11y.notes: Inner tablist gets aria-orientation horizontal/vertical based on the vertical attr. Each tab has role=tab + aria-selected + aria-controls. Each panel has role=tabpanel + aria-labelledby. Inactive panels get hidden; only the active panel is in the accessibility tree.
